title: Haven't Yet Seen Brunt of Energy Price Pressures in Data, Says Lindsey Piegza
title_cn: Lindsey Piegza 表示，数据中尚未看到能源价格压力的冲击
summary:
Lindsey Piegza, Chief Economist at Stifel, discusses the US economic backdrop as consumers maneuver around war-driven, high energy prices. 

US consumer confidence unexpectedly edged up in April to the highest this year as Americans grew more hopeful about the outlook for the labor market.   
The Conference Board’s gauge increased to 92.8, from 92.2 in March, data out Tuesday showed. The median estimate in a Bloomberg survey of economists called for a reading of 89.
A measure of expectations for the next six months climbed in April, while a gauge of present conditions ticked lower. 
The improvement in confidence, despite broader concerns tied to higher costs and war in the Middle East, may reflect a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran and signs of stabilization in the labor market. Hiring rebounded in March and more recent data point to limited layoffs.  (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: True Anomaly has raised $650 million in a fresh funding round, bringing the defense aerospace startup’s valuation to $2.2 billion as it looks to hire more employees and scale up its satellite business.

title: Atlas Copco’s Chipmaker-Exposed Unit Shines as Orders Disappoint
title_cn: 阿特拉斯·科普柯的芯片制造部门因订单令人失望而大放异彩
summary: Atlas Copco AB’s chipmaking-related business grew twice as strong as analysts expected, a bright spot for the company as other units disappointed.

title: Norway's Tangen on Markets, Real Estate, AI and China
title_cn: 挪威关于市场、房地产、人工智能和中国的讨论
summary: Nicolai Tangen, chief executive officer of Norges Bank Investment Management, discusses artificial intelligence, the speed of innovation in China and why he thinks real estate is attractive now. Speaking to Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua at NBIM's annual investment conference in Oslo, Tangen also says he sees signs of worry in private markets and that there is a "surprising" lack of market dislocation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Optical Computing Firm Lightelligence Jumps 384% in HK Debut
title_cn: 光计算公司 Lightelligence 在香港上市首日大涨 384%
summary: Lightelligence, a Chinese optical-computing provider, surged in its Hong Kong trading debut, underscoring investor interest in an industry seen as critical to supplying parts for the artificial-intelligence buildout.

title: Shin-Etsu Withholds Outlook Due to Iran War Price Disruption
title_cn: 信越因伊朗战争价格中断而暂缓展望
summary: Shin-Etsu Chemical Co. withheld its full-year forecast, citing supply constraints and price fluctuations stemming from the war in the Middle East.

title: OpenAI Said to Miss Its Own User and Sales Goals
title_cn: OpenAI 据称未能实现自己的用户和销售目标
summary: OpenAI recently failed to meet its own goals for new user acquisition and sales, fueling internal concerns that the company may struggle to support its spending on AI infrastructure, according to a Wall Street Journal report. Bloomberg's Neil Campling has the details. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japanese Crude Supertanker Manages Hormuz Exit in War First
title_cn: 日本原油超级油轮在战争中首次管理霍尔木兹出口
summary: A laden supertanker linked to Japan appears to have completed a transit through the Strait of Hormuz, in what may be the first successful attempt by an oil carrier from the country to leave the Persian Gulf since the Iran war began.

title: Kimmel Defends Joke in Latest Fight With Trump
title_cn: 基梅尔在与特朗普的最新战斗中为笑话辩护
summary: Late night host Jimmy Kimmel is defending a joke he made that caused President Donald Trump to say Walt Disney's ABC should fire him. Kimmel said on Monday night's show that he Trump both have a "right to free speech." Bloomberg's Lucas Shaw reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Hails US-UK Bond as King Charles Seeks to Repair Ties
title_cn: 查尔斯国王寻求修复关系，特朗普赞扬美英债券
summary: President Donald Trump praised the “cherished” bond between the US and UK ahead of a meeting with King Charles III designed to reaffirm ties during a low point in bilateral relations.

title: UAE Leaving OPEC at Right Time, Energy Minister Says
title_cn: 能源部长表示，阿联酋适时退出欧佩克
summary: The United Arab Emirates is leaving OPEC on May 1, dealing a blow to the group and its leader Saudi Arabia. UAE Energy Minister Suhail Al Mazrouei tells Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche that the timing is right because of the war in Iran. Bercetche spoke to him on the phone and she reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tensions Between Pakistan, Afghanistan Resume Amid Fresh Attacks
title_cn: 巴基斯坦和阿富汗之间的紧张局势因新的袭击而恢复
summary: Tensions resurfaced this week between Afghanistan and Pakistan after Kabul claimed its neighbor launched attacks across the border, killing four people and injuring 70 including 30 students, on Monday.

title: UK Says Envoy’s Remarks on US Ties Don’t Reflect Official Stance
title_cn: 英国表示特使关于美国关系的言论并不反映官方立场
summary: The UK said newly revealed remarks by its US ambassador, which appeared to play down the status of the so-called special relationship, don’t reflect the official position of the government.

title: Is the UK Leaning Too Hard on Its Royals?
title_cn: 英国是否过于依赖王室成员？
summary: Can royal pageantry help repair the UK’s “special relationship” with the US? Bloomberg Opinion columnist Rosa Prince questions the limits of royal power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Maurene Comey Suit Over DOJ Firing Can Proceed, Judge Rules
title_cn: 法官裁定莫林·科米因司法部解雇而提起的诉讼可以继续进行
summary: Former federal prosecutor Maurene Comey can proceed with a lawsuit claiming she was wrongfully fired because of President Donald Trump’s political feud with her father, former FBI director James Comey, a judge ruled.

title: Citadel’s Griffin to Meet With New York Governor After Mamdani Spat
title_cn: 马姆达尼发生口角后，Citadel 的格里芬将与纽约州州长会面
summary: Citadel’s Ken Griffin said he’s meeting with New York Governor Kathy Hochul on Thursday to talk about the future direction of America’s biggest city after a spat with Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s over his $238 million Manhattan penthouse.

title: Belarus Releases Polish Reporter Poczobut in Prisoner Swap
title_cn: 白俄罗斯以囚犯交换方式释放波兰记者波佐布特
summary: Belarus freed a prominent Polish journalist and activist from prison, meeting a longstanding demand of the neighboring European Union and NATO member.

title: Top DOJ Brass Rally Behind Trump Ballroom, Citing Gala Shooting
title_cn: 司法部高层在特朗普宴会厅后面举行铜管集会，援引晚会枪击事件
summary: Senior US Justice Department officials are citing an alleged assassination attempt at a gala attended by President Donald Trump over the weekend in a renewed effort to end a legal challenge to the construction of a new White House ballroom.

title: South Africa Extends Tax Cuts on Fuel Price to Offset War Impact
title_cn: 南非延长燃油价格减税以抵消战争影响
summary: South Africa extended cuts to fuel taxes as the prolonged conflict in the Middle East threatens to raise domestic gasoline and diesel prices even further.

title: London Mayor on AI, Migration, Local Elections, Farage
title_cn: 伦敦市长谈人工智能、移民、地方选举、Farage
summary: London Mayor Sadiq Khan discusses artificial intelligence, migration, affordable housing and why voters shouldn't back the populist Reform UK in next week’s local elections, describing Nigel Farage’s party as a “poor man’s version of President Trump and MAGA." Khan also backed Prime Minister Keir Starmer to survive the growing scandal around his 2024 appointment of Peter Mandelson as ambassador to Washington. He talks with Chad Thomas at Bloomberg's CityLab conference in Madrid, where a new forum involving mayors from across the world to ensure artificial intelligence works for effectively for cities was announced. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Germany Pushes On With Plan to Overhaul Healthcare and Budget
title_cn: 德国推进医疗保健和预算改革计划
summary: Germany agreed on a budget blueprint and prepared a healthcare overhaul as the governing coalition seeks to push forward a reform agenda in the face of energy upheaval and persistent infighting in Berlin.

title: Russian Disinformation War's Most Potent Weapon Is Bending Realities
title_cn: 俄罗斯虚假信息战争最有力的武器正在扭曲现实
summary: Storm-1516 uses fabricated videos, phony websites and anonymous influencers to spread tales about election fraud, corruption and sexual abuse.

title: Zelenskiy Challenges Israel Over Grain From Russia-Occupied Land
title_cn: 泽连斯基就俄罗斯占领土地上的粮食问题向以色列发起挑战
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy stepped up pressure on Israel, threatening to impose sanctions over the alleged import of grain from Ukrainian territory occupied by Russia.

title: Iraq Politicians Chose New Candidate for PM After Trump Pressure
title_cn: 在特朗普的压力下，伊拉克政界人士选择了新的总理候选人
summary: Former Iraqi Prime Minister Nouri Al-Maliki ended his bid to reclaim the role after pressure from the US, which was concerned by his close links to Iran.

title: Kyiv Ready for Next Winter After Zelenskiy Criticism, Mayor Says
title_cn: 基辅市长表示，在泽连斯基的批评之后，基辅已经为明年冬天做好了准备
summary: The Ukrainian capital is in a better shape to face next winter after Russian strikes caused mass power outages during this season’s prolonged sub-zero temperatures, Kyiv Mayor Vitali Klitschko said.

title: Russia Bet Backfires for Mali as Rebels Retake Pivotal Town
title_cn: 俄罗斯押注马里，叛军夺回重要城镇，结果适得其反
summary: Insurgents recaptured a Malian town that had come to symbolize Russia’s promise of delivering on security where Western forces had failed.

title: Hormuz Can Open Without Clearing All Mines, US Energy Chief Says
title_cn: 美国能源部长称霍尔木兹无需清除所有地雷即可开放
summary: Not all mines placed by Iran in the Strait of Hormuz need to removed for ships to resume transiting the vital passageway, US Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Tuesday.

title: NATO Draws Warning Over Chinese Minerals Overreliance
title_cn: 北约对中国矿产过度依赖发出警告
summary: The US and Europe need to move quickly on concrete projects that diversify military supply chains away from an over-dependence on Chinese critical minerals, according to senior officials from a NATO country.

title: London Mayor Khan Says Farage’s Reform Is ‘Poor Man’s MAGA’
title_cn: 伦敦市长汗称法拉奇的改革是“穷人的伟大”
summary: London Mayor Sadiq Khan urged voters not to back the populist Reform UK in next week’s local elections, describing Nigel Farage’s party as a “poor man’s version of President Trump and MAGA.”

title: Starmer Scrapes Through First Test in Day of Mandelson Trials
title_cn: 斯塔默勉强通过了曼德尔森审判日的第一次测试
summary: Keir Starmer’s former chief of staff denied pressuring officials to approve Peter Mandelson’s appointment as ambassador to the US, helping the UK prime minister approach a crucial vote in Parliament on the saga without major new reputational blows.

title: Spain’s Premier Urges Cities to Give Sanctuary to Migrants
title_cn: 西班牙总理敦促各城市为移民提供庇护
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez defended the country’s pro-migrant policies and called on other major cities around the world to become sanctuaries of diversity.

title: Warren Presses Bank Regulators on Trump’s Call to Cap Card Rates
title_cn: 沃伦就特朗普限制信用卡利率的呼吁向银行监管机构施压
summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren pressed US regulators on whether they plan to take action to rein in lenders after President Donald Trump’s push earlier this year for a temporary 10% cap on credit card rates resulted in little change.

title: Russia Ships the Most Crude in Over a Month as Port Attacks Ease
title_cn: 随着港口袭击缓解，俄罗斯原油运输量创一个多月以来最高水平
summary: Ukraine’s drone strikes switch back to refineries, allowing Moscow to boost seaborne flows
